section_title: No suit or other proceeding shall lie for the recovery of–
content:
30B. No suit or other proceeding shall lie for the recovery of–
recovery of
money,
(a) any sum of money paid or payable in respect of any agreement void
commission
etc., in under section 30A, or
respect of
void (b) any commission, brokerage, fee, or reward in respect of knowingly
agreements
effecting or carrying out, or aiding in effecting or carrying out, of any such
agreement or of any sum of money otherwise claimed or claimable in
respect thereof, or
(c) any sum of money knowingly paid or payable on account of any
person by way of commission, brokerage, fee, reward or other claim in
respect of any such agreement.
Payment by
